title: Charred Catalan Tofu Wrap
description: A smoky, pillowy tofu wrap with crunchy almond cookies and steamed spinach, perfect for a sattvic crowd-pleaser.
instructions: Press tofu to remove excess moisture for at least 15 minutes.
In a bowl, whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, cumin, lemon juice, soy sauce, and maple syrup.
Toss tofu cubes in the sauce, letting them marinate for 10 minutes.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat and sear tofu until golden on all sides, about 8 minutes.
While tofu cooks, quickly steam spinach leaves for 2 minutes, then pat dry.
Heat collard leaf wraps in a dry skillet for 30 seconds on each side to soften.
Spread a thin layer of tofu mixture on each wrap, leaving space on the edges.
Sprinkle almond cookie crumbs over the tofu for a crunchy, buttery contrast.
Fold the edges of the wrap and roll tightly, securing with a toothpick if needed.
Serve wraps warm, optionally with a wedge of lemon and a drizzle of extra sauce.
